product_overview: AI Hub is a prompt marketplace and workspace where users can browse AI prompts, access their personal library and dashboard, and manage account settings. The app also includes authentication and an admin area for privileged users.
core_goals: Access prompt details for individual items
Manage a personal library of saved prompts
Monitor activity through a user dashboard
Log in and sign out of the application

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can log in to access protected areas of the app and sign out when finished.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> View the login screen -> Authenticate with Supabase -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> View the login screen -> Authenticate with Supabase -> Access protected pages such as library and settings
View the authenticated session -> Click sign out -> Return to the public experience

features.name: Explore Prompts
features.description: Users can browse the public prompt marketplace and search for prompts to discover relevant content.
user_flows: Navigate to /explore -> Search prompts -> View filtered prompts

features.name: Prompt Details
features.description: Authenticated users can open a prompt's detail view to inspect its information.
user_flows: Navigate to /details/:id -> Access the prompt details page

features.name: User Library
features.description: Authenticated users can open their personal library to view saved prompts.

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated users can open their dashboard to review their account summary and activity.

features.name: Create Prompt
features.description: Authenticated users can create a new prompt from the creation screen.
user_flows: Navigate to /create -> Enter prompt details -> Submit the new prompt -> See the created prompt reflected in the app

features.name: Profile Settings
features.description: Authenticated users can edit their profile information from settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/edit-profile -> Update profile information -> Save changes -> See updated profile details

features.name: Subscription Settings
features.description: Authenticated users can review and manage their subscription preferences from settings.

features.name: Billing Details
features.description: Authenticated users can review billing information from settings.

features.name: Theme Settings
features.description: Authenticated users can adjust the application theme from settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/theme -> Change theme preference -> See the updated theme applied

features.name: Admin Area
features.description: Authorized authenticated users can access an admin screen for administrative tasks.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and signout using Supabase auth
